creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
I don't agree with that interpretation.

I don't read it to mean "any CVE, ever, even if it's obsolete".

E.g. read it as "If you maintain a port for a piece of software that already has an [applicable/current] entry in the CPE dictionary," ...

It makes no sense to be to add an expired CVE that doesn't not apply.

I'm happy to get the security team to clarify.
